summary: 3-page professional food delivery website for 'Samay Pizza' with Deep Red and White theme. Restaurant located at Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur (U.P). Website: samaypizza.com. Features: Home page with hero section, Menu page with categorized items and pricing, Order/Checkout page with WhatsApp integration and UPI payment.
architectural_notes: Tech stack: React/Next.js with Tailwind CSS, mobile-first design
UPI payment: monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank with QR code display
Brand: Deep Red and White color theme
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Deep red and white hero banner with a hot pizza illustration and warm restaurant ambiance (hero-banner.dim_1200x500.png)
- Samay Pizza logo with a stylized pizza slice and bold red text on white background (samay-pizza-logo.dim_300x300.png)
- UPI QR code graphic for UPI ID monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank in a clean white card with red border (upi-qr-code.dim_300x300.png)

existing_features.title: Rebuild the entire application as a 3-page food delivery website for 'Samay Pizza'. Replace all existing Funded Flex branding, routes, components, and pages with the new Samay Pizza website. The site must use a Deep Red (#C0392B / #B71C1C) and White color theme throughout, be fully mobile-responsive, and have a clean restaurant-style design.

Create the Home page with: (1) a large hero section with 'Welcome to Samay Pizza' headline and subtext, (2) fast delivery feature icons/badges, (3) a prominent 'Order Now' button that navigates to the Menu page, and (4) a footer displaying the restaurant address (Sonauli Road Pipiganj, Gorakhpur, U.P.), contact WhatsApp number +918957401994, email monikakgupta2507@gmail.com, and website samaypizza.com.

Create the Menu page with categorized menu items and pricing displayed as cards or a structured list. Categories and items: (1) Pizza (Regular/Medium/Large pricing): Cheese Corn (₹90/150/250), Spicy Indian (₹100/150/250), Simply Veg, Paneer Ka Maza, Double Cheese, Paneer Makhani, Sabz Bahar, Samay Pizza Special (₹150/180/300), Tandoori Paneer, Veggie Supreme, Best Pataka, Chatpata Paneer. (2) Chinese (Half/Full): Veg Chowmein (₹50/100), Paneer Chowmein (₹60/120), Mix Chowmein, Paneer Chilli, Paneer Chilli Gravy, Chilli Potato, Veg Manchurian Dry/Gravy. (3) Rice (Half/Full): Veg Fried Rice (₹50/100), Paneer Fried Rice (₹60/120), Veg Biryani (₹70/130). (4) Burger: Veg Burger (₹40), Classic Burger (₹60), Veg Cheese Burger (₹60), Classic Cheese Burger (₹80). (5) Snacks/Extras: French Fries, Lava Cake, Extra Cheese/Toppings. Each menu item must have an 'Add to Cart' button that adds the selected size/variant to a cart state.

Create the Order/Checkout page with: (1) a cart summary showing all added items, quantities, sizes, and total price; (2) a customer form with fields for Name, Phone Number, and Delivery Address; (3) a 'Place Order' button that opens WhatsApp (wa.me/918957401994) with a pre-filled message containing the full item list, total price, and customer details; (4) a UPI payment section displaying UPI ID 'monikabhojwal2507@okhdfcbank' and a generated QR code image for this UPI ID, with a 'Pay Now' button.

new_feature_requests.summary: Home page with hero section 'Welcome to Samay Pizza', fast delivery icons, and Order Now button
Menu page with categorized items: Pizza (Regular/Medium/Large), Chinese (Half/Full), Rice, Burger, Snacks with pricing
Order/Checkout page with cart summary, customer form, WhatsApp pre-filled order message, email notification, and UPI QR code payment

Store contact form submissions and order details in the backend canister. The backend should accept and persist: customer name, phone number, address, order items (as a text summary), and total price. Provide a query method for the admin to retrieve all orders.

Apply a visually rich Deep Red and White design theme across the entire site: deep red (#B71C1C or #C0392B) as the primary brand color for headers, buttons, and accents; white backgrounds for content areas; warm typography; food-appropriate iconography (pizza, delivery scooter, etc.); smooth hover effects on menu cards and buttons.
